checks: Matched full-screen dark intro, Nexion header, top-right globe language action, dotted compute backdrop, floating nodes, central compute orb, live stats, primary and secondary CTAs
Language trigger opens a bottom sheet with 10 locale options grouped by priority
Selecting Simplified Chinese persists nexion_app_locale=zh and changes intro copy immediately
Pre-login intro header hides search and notification actions
Unauthenticated launch redirects to onboarding intro
Auth close action returns to onboarding intro
differences: Prototype uses SVG/lucide/framer-motion details; uni-app uses CSS views and text-safe icons for App portability
Prototype runtime screenshot only rendered the background during capture, so source implementation was also used as reference
